justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, migrating javax.* to jakarta.* and JUnit 4 to JUnit 5, and adds @Serial for serialVersionUID. However, it adds an explicit junit:junit dependency (JUnit 4) which contradicts the JUnit 5 migration and is unnecessary since Spring Boot 3 includes JUnit 5 via spring-boot-starter-test. Also, no Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) are introduced.
